section.heading: Additional research authorities of the FCC
section.chapeau: In order to carry out the purposes of this chapter, the Commission may—

paragraph.content: undertake research and development work in connection with any matter in relation to which the Commission has jurisdiction; and
promote the carrying out of such research and development by others, or otherwise to arrange for such research and development to be carried out by others.

section.sourceCredit: (June 19, 1934, ch. 652, title I, § 12, as added Pub. L. 111–358, title VIII, § 803, Jan. 4, 2011, 124 Stat. 4043.)

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: This chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning act June 19, 1934, ch. 652, 48 Stat. 1064, known as the Communications Act of 1934, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see section 609 of this title and Tables.
